package bleve

import (

	tb.Helper()

	"testing"
	"time"
)

func createTmpIndexPath(tb testing.TB) string {
	tb.Helper()
	p := filepath.Join(os.TempDir(), fmt.Sprintf("bleve_tmp_index_%d", time.Now().UnixNano()))
	if err := os.MkdirAll(p, 0o755); err != nil {
		tb.Fatalf("createTmpIndexPath failed: %v", err)
	}
	return p
}

func cleanupTmpIndexPath(tb testing.TB, path string) {
	tb.Helper()
	if path == "" {
		return
	}
	if err := os.RemoveAll(path); err != nil {
		tb.Fatalf("cleanupTmpIndexPath failed: %v", err)
	}
}
